description: Plain-language copy for the zero-code wizard screens owned by this lane: welcome, the four thinking-power setup paths plus the demo link, the microphone check, and the schedule screen. Every string value here must stay clean of contracts/microcopy_glossary.json internal terms and must not contain an em dash. Checked by check_wizard_copy.mjs in this directory.

welcome.heading: Welcome to Operant
welcome.body: Operant learns the things you do on your computer so it can do them for you.

setup_path.heading: How should Operant think?
setup_path.subheading: Pick how Operant gets its thinking power. You can change this later in settings.

chatgpt.title: Sign in with ChatGPT
chatgpt.body: Use the AI plan you already pay for. No keys to copy.

claude.title: Sign in with Claude
claude.body: Use the AI plan you already pay for. No keys to copy.

local.title: Download a free brain
local.body: Get a model that runs right on this computer. Free and private, and it keeps working without the internet once it is downloaded.
local.disk_check_label: Checking free space on this computer.
local.disk_check_ok: You have enough room for this.
local.disk_check_low: This computer is short on space. Free up {needed} and try again.
local.compatibility_check_label: Checking whether this computer can run it well.
local.compatibility_check_ok: This computer can run it well.
local.compatibility_check_slow: This computer can run it, but it may think slowly.
local.compatibility_check_fail: This computer does not have enough graphics memory for this option. Try signing in with ChatGPT or Claude instead.

download.resuming: Picking up where it left off.
download.paused: Paused. What is already downloaded is saved.

access_key.title: I have an access key
access_key.body: Paste the access key you already have. Operant will figure out where it is from.
access_key.provider_label: Which service is this key from?
access_key.provider_auto_detected: We recognized this key. It looks like it is from {provider}.
access_key.provider_pick_manually: We could not tell where this key is from. Pick it from the list below.

mic_check.heading: Let's check your microphone
mic_check.body: Say something and watch the level meter move. This makes sure Operant can hear you when you talk to it.
mic_check.failed: We could not hear anything. Check that your microphone is connected and try again.

schedule.heading: Want this to run by itself?
schedule.body: Choose when Operant should do this on its own, or run it yourself whenever you like.

checksum_mismatch.what: The downloaded file did not match what we expected.
checksum_mismatch.why: This can happen if the download was interrupted or the connection was not trustworthy.

network_error.what: The download could not reach the server.
network_error.why: This usually means the internet connection dropped.
network_error.action: Check your connection and try again.

disk_space.what: There was not enough room to save the download.
disk_space.why: This computer is low on free space.
disk_space.action: Free up some space and try again.

not_found.what: The download could not find the file it was looking for.
not_found.why: The link to this file may be out of date.
not_found.action: Try again later, or pick a different option.
